headline: Every missed call costs you a customer.
subheadline: Across all your locations. Every day.
action: We prove it in 14 days — at one location, with real calls, on your line.
actionHighlight: After 2 weeks, you'll know exactly how many calls you're missing, how many appointments are being booked, and what that's worth in revenue. The data makes the decision for you.
ctaSecondary: Request a demo. 30 minutes. No slides.
problemHeadline: You already know the problem. You just don't know the number.
problem1: Your front desk is overwhelmed. Your field teams can't answer the phone. Across your 5, 10, or 20 locations, hundreds of calls go to voicemail every week. Each one is a patient who books elsewhere, a client who calls your competitor, a deal that never happens.
problem2: You've tried call centers. They don't know your business. You've added headcount at reception. They call in sick. You've set up phone trees. Customers hang up. The problem isn't that you haven't tried — it's that no solution scales across locations without losing quality.
problem2emphasis: The missed calls don't stop. They compound.
problem3: There is a way to answer every call, at every location, around the clock — with something that knows your business as well as your best employee. And it never calls in sick.
shift1: One assistant for every problem that costs you revenue today.
shift2: In the demo, you'll hear the one that matters most — live, on a real call.
agent1Desc: Answers every call, knows your business, qualifies leads, books appointments. Works evenings, weekends, holidays. The assistant you demo first.
agent2Desc: A patient cancels in Berlin. The slot is filled from the Munich waitlist before your receptionist notices. Reschedules, confirms, chases no-shows. One system across every site.
agent3Desc: Phone, webchat, email — every inquiry qualified and routed to the right person in under 60 seconds. Your sales team only talks to buyers.
agent4Desc: Field workers record what they see. The assistant turns it into formatted quotes with correct line items and pricing. Review, adjust, send.
agent5Desc: Automated follow-up after appointments, quotes, or service calls via WhatsApp or email. Captures feedback, resurfaces at-risk customers.
agent6Desc: Someone calls in sick at 6 AM. By 6:05, the shift is covered. Vacation planning, escalations, handoffs — your team coordinates through the assistant, not through WhatsApp groups.
agent7Desc: Per-location call volume, response times, booking rates, customer satisfaction. Real-time visibility for every manager. No more monthly reports.
chatSubheadline: Answer a few questions about your locations, team, and biggest bottleneck. In 5 minutes, you'll know which of the seven has the biggest revenue impact — and why.
bookDemoHeadline: Prefer to talk to a human first?
bookDemoText: Book 30 minutes with Remington. He'll review your business live — no slides, no AI. Just a conversation about how we can take work off your team and make your customers happier.
marcusEngelDetail: Marcus was losing deals to agents who simply picked up the phone faster. Now every call is answered — listings, viewings, lead qualification handled before the caller hangs up. Missed calls dropped from 34% to 2%. Closed deals per quarter nearly doubled.
marcusEngelScaleCallout: Now imagine this across a team of 15 agents.
lutzDesc: Retired Shareholder · Board Chair · Email Assistant
lutzDetail: Lutz is a retired shareholder, active in three associations — and he was drowning in 47 spam emails a day. His assistant learned who matters, intercepts noise before it hits his inbox, and handles unsubscriptions. Now he gets 0–2 spam per day. Hasn't missed a single legitimate email in three months.
franziskaDetail: Franziska's team vacation planning was chaos — WhatsApp messages, paper calendars, coverage gaps. She connected Slack to her assistant with custom escalation rules she defined herself. Scheduling conflicts went from weekly to zero. Coordination time dropped from 3+ hours to 20 minutes per week.
thomasDetail: Thomas is a master electrician running a four-person shop. After work, he'd spend another 2–3 hours on quotes — typing up measurements, calculating line items, formatting PDFs. Now he records a voice note on-site and gets a draft quote back with correct line items and pricing. Reviews, adjusts, sends. Quote time per week: from over 5 hours to 45 minutes. Same-day instead of three days later.
kirstenDesc: Attorney · Eberswalde · AI Receptionist & Lead Classification
kirstenDetail: Kirsten is a solo Fachanwältin for employment and social law. She has a receptionist, but office hours only cover 17 hours a week — and crises don't wait. She and her receptionist personally trained an AI assistant that takes over whenever life gets in the way: evenings, weekends, sick days, lunch breaks. It classifies callers through a 4-level system they defined together and books qualified consultations directly into her calendar. Reachability: from 17 hours to 24/7. Qualified consultations nearly doubled.
proofMidMarketCallout: These results are from single users. Our mid-market clients deploy the same assistants across 5–20 locations — and the numbers scale with them.
processHeadline: From demo to live in 2 weeks
processSubheadline: A proven process that lets the product sell itself.
processStep1Desc: See the phone assistant in action. Call the demo number yourself. 30 minutes with the founder.
processStep2Desc: Get a configured demo assistant, scripts, and an ROI calculator. Show your team what you just saw.
processStep3Desc: We set up a real assistant at one location. It answers real calls for 2 weeks. You see the data.
processStep4Desc: The trial data makes the decision obvious. Roll out across all locations.
pathsHeadline: From demo to live in 2 weeks
startFreeDesc: 30 minutes. See the assistant answer calls live. Call the demo number yourself.
doneWithYouDesc: Show your team. Demo number, ROI calculator, 1-page guide.
fullBuildDesc: Real assistant, real calls, one location. Hard data in 14 days.
createAccountCarryContext: Create account and keep your progress
personalNote: "I don't do slides. I pick up the phone and show you. If the product doesn't sell itself in 30 minutes, I haven't done my job."
whyNotCallText: No slides. No pitch deck. You'll call a real phone number and talk to a real AI assistant that knows a real business. In 30 minutes, you'll know whether this works. Then I'll give you the tools to show your team.
whyAgents: Why a trial instead of a proposal?
whyAgentsText: Because proposals don't answer phones. A 2-week trial gives you hard data: calls answered, appointments booked, response times, leads captured. After 2 weeks, the decision isn't about trust — it's about numbers.
demoKitSubheadline: Everything you need to show your team.
demoKitItem1Desc: A real phone number your team can call. The assistant answers, knows the business, books appointments.
demoKitItem2Desc: Pre-filled with your numbers. Shows exactly what missed calls cost you across all locations.
demoKitItem3Desc: A 1-page script so your team can experience it themselves in 60 seconds.
demoKitItem4Desc: Slack or WhatsApp support during the entire demo and trial period.
agentsEverywhereHeadline: Your assistants work where you work
iphoneDesc: On the go — at the job site, with clients, in the car. Your assistant is with you.
macosDesc: At your desk. Review quotes, go through reports, plan your day.
windowsDesc: Same power on Windows. Full desktop experience for your whole team.
androidDesc: Same assistants. Same context. Any device.
webAppDesc: In the browser. No installation. Ready instantly.
agentsEverywhereTagline: Same assistants. Same knowledge. Every device.
integrationsHeadline: Works with what you already run
integrationsSubheadline: Your assistants speak to your tools. Not the other way around.
privacySubheadline: GDPR compliant. Hosted in Germany. No third-party sharing.
cloudOptionDesc: All data is processed and stored in the EU. Fully compliant with the General Data Protection Regulation.
localOptionDesc: Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest. No model is trained on your data.
enterpriseOptionDesc: You decide which data your assistant uses. Viewable, exportable, and deletable at any time.
bringYourOwnDesc: For businesses with special requirements: run your assistants on your own infrastructure.
privacyTagline: Privacy isn't a feature — it's the foundation.
footerTagline: AI assistants for businesses ready to scale differently.
agent1Skill1: Answer every inbound call within 2 rings
agent1Skill2: Qualify leads by budget, timeline, and need
agent1Skill3: Book appointments directly into your calendar
agent1Skill4: Answer FAQ about your services, hours, and locations
agent1Skill5: Route urgent calls to the right team member
agent1Skill6: Send follow-up SMS with booking confirmations
agent1Outcome2: Leads booked before they call your competitor
agent1Outcome3: Customers feel heard from the very first ring
agent1VoiceDesc: Clara picks up before the second ring and already knows why you're calling. Polished, unhurried, and completely in control — even when she's juggling three things at once.
agent1ToneDesc: The warmth of a great hotel concierge. Patient if you're unsure what you need, decisive the moment you are. Never chatty, never cold.
agent2Skill1: Check availability across all locations in real time
agent2Skill3: No-show follow-up via WhatsApp or SMS
agent2Skill5: Waitlist management for popular time slots
agent2Outcome1: No-show rate drops by up to 40%
agent2Outcome2: Every cancellation recovered, every slot filled
agent2VoiceDesc: Maren talks the way a cleared calendar feels. She already knows what's open, what's waitlisted, and what just freed up across all your locations.
agent2ToneDesc: Calm and precise. If you cancel, she offers the next option before you finish apologizing. Makes complicated scheduling sound like a simple question.
agent3Skill1: Sort incoming inquiries from phone, email, and webchat
agent3Skill2: Qualify by budget, authority, need, and timeline
agent3Skill3: Route qualified leads to the right department
agent3Skill4: Log every interaction with CRM-ready summaries
agent3Skill5: Follow up on unresponsive leads after 24 hours
agent3Outcome1: No qualified lead waits more than a minute
agent3Outcome2: Your pipeline fills itself — no manual entry
agent3Outcome3: Pipeline visibility without manual CRM entry
agent3VoiceDesc: Jonas listens to your problem first and qualifies second. By the end of the call, he's summarized your need more clearly than you could.
agent3ToneDesc: Direct without pressure. Asks four questions where others ask twelve. You'll feel consulted, not interrogated.
agent4Skill1: Convert voice notes into structured quote drafts
agent4Skill2: Auto-fill line items with correct pricing
agent4Skill4: Generate PDF quotes ready for review
agent4Skill5: Track quote status and follow up on unsent drafts
agent4Outcome1: Quotes sent same-day, not next week
agent4Outcome2: Field crews document without touching a keyboard
agent4Outcome3: Revenue captured that used to slip through the cracks
agent4VoiceDesc: Tobias sounds like he's been on the job site. You describe what you see, he turns it into scope, line items, and a draft quote — while you're still standing there.
agent4ToneDesc: Trade language, no jargon. If something's missing from the note, he asks one follow-up question, not five. The output reads like a foreman wrote it, not an office.
agent5Skill2: Follow up on open quotes via WhatsApp
agent5Skill3: Spot at-risk customers from late replies and declining visits
agent5Skill4: Request Google reviews from satisfied customers
agent5Skill5: Re-engage inactive customers with personalized messages
agent5Outcome2: At-risk customers flagged before they leave
agent5Outcome3: Repeat bookings increase — and you see the numbers
agent5VoiceDesc: Lina follows up the way you'd want to — the day after an appointment, after a quote goes quiet, when a regular hasn't been back. Every message sounds like it was written for one person.
agent5ToneDesc: Warm but never pushy. Knows the difference between a happy customer who'd leave a review and a frustrated one who needs a callback. Never sounds like a drip campaign.
agent6Skill3: Route escalations to the right manager
agent6Outcome1: Shift gaps filled without manager phone calls
agent6Outcome2: Every handoff documented — nothing falls through
agent6VoiceDesc: Kai is the voice your operations manager wishes they had at 6 AM. Someone calls in sick — Kai already has a coverage plan, an owner for every task, and a clean handoff.
agent6ToneDesc: Neutral and steady. Doesn't lecture, doesn't over-explain. Delivers a plan: who, what, when. No loose ends.
agent7Skill1: Show live performance for every location
agent7Skill2: Track call volume and response times
agent7Skill6: Deliver weekly performance digests to managers
agent7Outcome1: Underperforming locations spotted in real time
agent7Outcome2: Every location manager sees exactly where they stand
agent7Outcome3: Weekly insights delivered, not buried in spreadsheets
agent7VoiceDesc: Nora doesn't read you a dashboard. She tells you your Munich location's booking rate dropped 12% last week, the likely cause is Thursday afternoon coverage, and what to change.
agent7ToneDesc: Analytical but never dry. Every number comes with a reason and a recommendation. She won't overwhelm you with data — she'll tell you the one thing that matters most.
demoCallModalBodyIntro: Enter the phone number you will call from. Clara will know you want to try
demoCallModalPhoneLabel: Phone number you will call from
demoCallModalPrivacyNote: We only keep this routing hint briefly so the demo call can open in the right context.
demoCallModalReadyBody: Call the demo line from that same number within the next 20 minutes and she will open with the right specialist context.
demoCallModalError: We could not prepare the demo call. Please try again.
agentSectionFrontlineSubline: The specialists Clara coordinates to handle your calls, appointments, leads, and follow-ups.
agentSectionSpecialistSubline: The back-office layer that keeps operations running across every location.
agent1VoiceIntroScript: Hi, I'm Clara — your AI receptionist. This call may be recorded and shared with our service providers. I'm here to take your calls, route you to the right specialist, and make sure nothing gets missed.
agent2VoiceIntroScript: Hi, I'm Maren. I coordinate appointments across all your locations — booking, rescheduling, no-show recovery. Tell me what you need and I'll find the best slot.
agent3VoiceIntroScript: Hi, I'm Jonas. I qualify your inbound leads so your sales team only talks to real opportunities. Describe an inquiry and I'll walk you through the process.
agent4VoiceIntroScript: Hi, I'm Tobias. I turn rough field notes into structured, quote-ready documentation — no typing required. Just describe the job and I'll draft it.
agent5VoiceIntroScript: Hi, I'm Lina. I handle your follow-ups after appointments, open quotes, and service visits — so nothing falls through the cracks. Let me show you how that sounds.
agent6VoiceIntroScript: Hi, I'm Kai. When someone calls in sick at 6 AM, the shift is covered by 6:05. I coordinate vacation planning, escalations, and handoffs through one assistant instead of scattered WhatsApp groups.
agent7VoiceIntroScript: Hi, I'm Nora. I turn your location data into clear insight — what's happening, why, and what to do next. Let me show you with an example.
